google_cloud_reference.note: Google Cloud commands are documented for local validation only. This config does not connect to Google Cloud, read bucket contents, or alter existing TIFF data.

source_authority_decision.decision: Use FEMA NFHL as the authoritative regulatory flood constraint source. Retain the existing Google Cloud TIFF as modeled/static reference and future prediction input.

constraint_sources.title: FEMA NFHL Flood Hazard Zones
notes: Use this layer first for Phase 7 parcel flood constraint overlay.
Treat floodway values in ZONE_SUBTY as severe/regulatory review candidates.
Clip/query to Cabarrus County extent during ingestion; do not ingest nationwide data unbounded.

constraint_sources.title: FEMA NFHL Flood Hazard Boundaries
constraint_sources.primary_for: QA support, not first parcel flood overlay
notes: Use to review special flood hazard area boundaries, limit lines, and boundary QA.
Do not substitute this polyline layer for parcel floodplain/floodway area overlay.

constraint_sources.title: FEMA NFHL Water Areas
constraint_sources.use: later hydrology/environmental constraint reference, not first flood overlay
notes: Reserve for later hydrology context and environmental sensitivity work.
Do not include in the first regulatory parcel flood overlay.

constraint_sources.title: Existing Google Cloud Flood TIFF
constraint_sources.use: future flood risk modeling, raster reference, comparison against FEMA
notes: Do not delete existing TIFF/raster data.
Use later for modeled/static reference, raster comparison, or future prediction inputs after regulatory flood overlays are stable.
This config does not connect to Google Cloud or enumerate bucket contents.

constraint_sources.refresh_notes: Refresh from Cabarrus County Open Data when school attendance zone boundaries are published or updated.
notes: Use attendance-zone polygon overlap for parcel elementary school assignment.
Do not assign parcels by distance to school point locations.
CFS V1 assignment includes public CCS attendance-zone records only.

constraint_sources.refresh_notes: Refresh from Cabarrus County Open Data when school attendance zone boundaries are published or updated.
notes: Use attendance-zone polygon overlap for parcel middle school assignment.
Do not assign parcels by distance to school point locations.
CFS V1 assignment includes public CCS attendance-zone records only.

constraint_sources.refresh_notes: Refresh from Cabarrus County Open Data when school attendance zone boundaries are published or updated.
notes: Use attendance-zone polygon overlap for parcel high school assignment.
Do not assign parcels by distance to school point locations.
CFS V1 assignment includes public CCS attendance-zone records only.

constraint_sources.refresh_notes: Refresh as a school reference/dictionary layer; do not use point distance for parcel assignment.
notes: Use only as a school reference table and name matching dictionary.
CFS V1 includes public CCS elementary, middle, and high schools only; KCS, private, magnet, and Other school records are preserved for QA/future work.
Preserve private, magnet, and Other records for QA/future work.
